purpose: Prerequisite videos for Grade 4 NCERT Chapter 12: Ticking Clocks and Turning Calendar
description: Videos covering: reading the hour hand on a clock, skip counting by 5s for minutes, and days of the week and months of the year

videos.title: Reading the Hour Hand
videos.description: Review how the short hand on a clock shows the hour. Before learning to tell the full time, you need to know how to read which hour it is by looking at where the short hand points!
learningObjectives: Identify the short (hour) hand on a clock
Read what hour the short hand is pointing to
Build foundation for reading minutes and full time

videos.title: Skip Counting by 5s
videos.description: Review how to count by 5s: 5, 10, 15, 20, 25... This skill is important because each number on the clock face stands for 5 minutes. If you can skip count by 5s, reading minutes becomes easy!
learningObjectives: Connect skip counting by 5s to reading minutes on a clock

videos.title: Days of the Week and Months
videos.description: Learn the 7 days of the week and the 12 months of the year in order. Knowing these names and their sequence is important before you start reading calendars and solving calendar problems!
learningObjectives: Name all 7 days of the week in order
Name all 12 months of the year in order
Build foundation for reading calendars and solving date problems

usageNotes.purpose: Review clock basics, skip counting by 5s, and calendar vocabulary before learning about time and calendars in Chapter 12
usageNotes.recommendationStrategy: Select based on weak concepts identified in readiness assessment
usageNotes.sequencing: Reading the hour hand → Skip counting by 5s → Days of the week and months
